Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''フリーダムアーキテクツ'' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name")

Bash(node -e "const window = {}; eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''js/data.js'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''OK - categories:'', window.HOUSE_DATA.specs.categories.length, ''gallery:'', window.HOUSE_DATA.gallery.categories.map\(c => c.name + '':'' + c.images.length\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const window = {}; eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''js/data.js'',''utf8''\)\); const d = window.HOUSE_DATA; console.log\(''OK''\); console.log\(''estimate top:'', d.estimate.topLevel.length, ''items''\); console.log\(''main subcats:'', d.estimate.details.main.subcategories.length\); console.log\(''levels:'', Object.keys\(d.levels\).join\('', ''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const window = {}; eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''js/data.js'',''utf8''\)\); const d=window.HOUSE_DATA; console.log\(''data.js OK''\); console.log\(''  estimate total:'', d.estimate.total\); console.log\(''  main subcats:'', d.estimate.details.main.subcategories.length\); console.log\(''  1F rooms:'', d.levels[''1F''].rooms.length\); console.log\(''  2F rooms:'', d.levels[''2F''].rooms.length\); console.log\(''  loft rooms:'', d.levels[''loft''].rooms.length\); console.log\(''  section levels:'', d.section.levels.length\); console.log\(''  specs cats:'', d.specs.categories.length\); console.log\(''  gallery total:'', d.gallery.categories.reduce\(\(s,c\)=>s+c.images.length,0\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const window = {}; eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''js/data.js'',''utf8''\)\); const d=window.HOUSE_DATA; console.log\(''marketRanges:'', Object.keys\(d.marketRanges\).length, ''items''\); let count=0; Object.values\(d.estimate.details\).forEach\(det => { const items = det.items || []; if \(det.subcategories\) det.subcategories.forEach\(s => { if\(s.items\) s.items.forEach\(i => { if\(i.unitPrice && d.marketRanges[i.name]\) count++; }\); }\); else items.forEach\(i => { if\(i.unitPrice && d.marketRanges[i.name]\) count++; }\); }\); console.log\(''Items with market data:'', count\);")

Bash(node -e "const window={}; eval\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''js/data.js'',''utf8''\)\); const D=window.HOUSE_DATA; let t=0,u=0,d=0,th=0; D.specs.categories.forEach\(c=>c.subcategories.forEach\(s=>{if\(!s.items\)return;s.items.forEach\(i=>{t++;if\(i.productUrl\)u++;if\(i.description\)d++;if\(i.thumb\)th++}\)}\)\); console.log\(''items:'',t,''urls:'',u,''desc:'',d,''thumbs:'',th,''cats:'',D.specs.categories.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const css=fs.readFileSync\(''css/style.css'',''utf8''\); let depth=0; let ok=true; for\(let i=0;i<css.length;i++\){if\(css[i]===''{''\)depth++;if\(css[i]===''}''\)depth--;if\(depth<0\){ok=false;break;}} console.log\(''Depth:'',depth,''OK:'',depth===0&&ok\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const css=fs.readFileSync\(''css/style.css'',''utf8''\); let d=0,ok=true; for\(let i=0;i<css.length;i++\){if\(css[i]===''{''\)d++;if\(css[i]===''}''\)d--;if\(d<0\){ok=false;break;}} console.log\(''CSS braces balanced:'',d===0&&ok\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const css=fs.readFileSync\(''css/style.css'',''utf8''\); let d=0,ok=true; for\(let i=0;i<css.length;i++\){if\(css[i]===''{''\)d++;if\(css[i]===''}''\)d--;if\(d<0\){ok=false;break;}} console.log\(''CSS OK:'',d===0&&ok\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const css=fs.readFileSync\(''css/style.css'',''utf8''\); let d=0; for\(let i=0;i<css.length;i++\){if\(css[i]===''{''\)d++;if\(css[i]===''}''\)d--;} console.log\(''CSS OK:'',d===0\);")
